title: BadMoon
description: BadMoon client is a 1.8.9 bedwars client which provides fun visual features that improve gameplay drastically! (Ranked/Unranked)
body:
>This is **BadMoon Client**, a client built for easy use.

> What is this client for?  
BadMoon is mainly for BedWars with _BedWars-specific_ features that will be covered below  

> What makes this client better than others?  
BadMoon client has a lot of features that make it both Hypixel-legal while also being a mixin-based client, meaning you can pair it with almost anything on Forge! it also is built to allow so much more customizablility that BadLion and Lunar just dont give you. 

Notable Features:  
`ActiveModules`
>A hack-client-like module viewer which displays all active modules on your HUD.
>This module supports customizability such as:
- Custom Color  
- Custom Scale  
- Custom Color Module (like rainbow and pulsing)  
- Size and position changing  
- Max module amounts  
- SideBar  
- etc…  

`Chat Module`
>A simple module that allows you to:
- Remove Chat Background  
- Move chat around the screen  
- Copy any chat message with a custom key  
- Highlight your own name/underline it  

`ModuleScale`
>Allows you to make the modules smaller

`Notifications`
>This module removes the “Username Purchased This Item” message and replaces it with a single  
>toast that pops up in the top right of the screen. The notification displays how many  
items were purchased over the past 3 seconds. Here is an example:  
>Without the module, chat looks like:  
- You Purchased 16 Wool
- You Purchased 16 Wool
- You Purchased 16 Wool
- You Purchased 16 Wool
>With my module enabled you see at the top of your screen  
- Bought: Wool x4


`ItemPhysics`
>A highly configurable module that allows dropped items to have physics!
>You can change settings like:
>Spin X Speed
>Spin Y Speed
>and the size of different resources

`Custom Message`
>A simple client-side message that floats above your head :)

`DelayedPlayerModel`
>A simple visual module that makes the player head have a slight delay
>>(This does not affect where your head actually is! Just the client-side model)

`HitBoxes`
>A simple mod that just allows you to change the color of hitboxes

`HitColor`
>A simple mod that allows you to change the hit color to whatever color you want

`NickHider`
>A custom module that allows you to change your own name visually
>(Just like the one in Lunar/BadLion)

`HandBlock`
>Visually blocks the right hand across the screen when right-clicking without an item.

`NoAnimDelay`
>Makes it so when you punch, the animation happens instantly, and when you click again the animation cuts itself off to start again. This makes the hit feedback feel a lot better.



Issue Tracker!:
| Issue Source        | Issue                 | Fix Date             |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Canceling Vanilla Crosshair | Small Gl State Leak on HotBar | July 1st 2026 |
| Zoom | multiple issues | Jun 24th 2026 |
| Unknown Source | Broken Shader on Hand | When Source is Identified |
| Particles | the "Always Show Sharpness particles" doesnt always work | FIXED 1.4 |
| PlayerNameHider | Tab list/Chat doesnt always hide | FIXED 1.4 |






(Please check the [Versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/badmoon/versions) to see bug history)

| [Idle Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/idletweaks)| [1.0.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/idletweaks/version/v1.0.5)| Jun 15th 2026 |

| [EvergreenHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/evergreenhud)| [2.1.7](https://modrinth.com/mod/evergreenhud/version/YAwKwEPz)| Jun 15th 2026 |
| [In-Game Account Switcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-game-account-switcher) | [8.0.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-game-account-switcher/version/fytQEqFH) | Jun 15th 2026 |
| [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) | [1.2.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers/version/ki0fDpDd) | Jun 15th 2026 |

These versions are the ones ive tested, newer/older versions aswell as other mods may work aswell!
